name: superflow
description: An evidence-gated software delivery harness that plans with the user, then implements, reviews, and verifies autonomously.

interface.longDescription: Turns a coding request into an approved implementation contract, then runs isolated implementation, review, repair, and verification loops without routine user intervention.
defaultPrompt: Use Superflow to plan and implement this feature end to end.
Use Superflow to diagnose, fix, review, and verify this bug.
